title: Setting up a production order
source: official iorad PDF 2401614 (Setting up a production order)

steps.caption: Welcome to the DISH POS dashboard. In this tutorial we show you how to set up a production order.
First, under Articles click on Products.
You are now in the products overview.
To get a better overview of the production order of your articles, click on Columns and select Production Order.
You now see the Production Order column with the order number of each product. The product with the lowest number is listed first on the production ticket/screen.
If you want to adjust the production order for a specific product group, click on Filter.
Then select the product group(s) you want to adjust.
To add a production order, click into the field under the Production Order column of the respective product.
Enter the order number in the text field. That's it - you now know how to set up a production order.
